perturbation.original_text: 1. GRANT OF RIGHTS. Subject to the terms and conditions set forth herein, Theismann hereby grants to Bizzingo and its affiliates the unlimited right and privilege during the Term (as defined herein) and within the Territory to use the Property (as defined herein) in connection with the advertisement, promotion, and sale of the Network in the Territory whether through film, television, radio, print and Internet media, including the right to use the Property in or on the Network. It being understood and agreed that Bizzingo shall have the right to exhibit commercials, infomercials, advertisements and otherwise make use of all Property on a worldwide basis and that Bizzingo and its affiliates shall be the sole owner of all commercials, promotional materials and other items produced or created hereunder and all related rights worldwide, including, without limitation, copyright, trademark and intellectual property rights, subject however to the terms and conditions herein. Theismann agrees to cooperate with Bizzzingo's promotional efforts in this regard. In addition, as reasonably requested by Bizzingo, Theismann agrees to provide Bizzingo with such signatures, photographs and the like in order to fulfill his obligations hereunder. 1 Source: BIZZINGO, INC., 8-K, 3/22/2012 Bizzingo agrees that any use of the Property for advertising, promotional or sale purposes will be approved in advance by Theismann. Theismann agrees that such material, submitted for approval as provided herein may be deemed by Bizzingo to have been approved hereunder if the same is not disapproved by the Theismann in writing within fourteen (14) days after Theismann's receipt thereof. Theismann agrees that any material submitted hereunder will not be unreasonably disapproved and, if it is disapproved, that Theismann shall advise Bizzingo in writing of the specific grounds therefor at the time of disapproval and provide Bizzingo with specific changes or alterations to such materials. Bizzingo thereafter shall have the right and privileged to use such Property as provided in this Agreement subject to such changes or alterations. Except as stated herein, no other rights or privileges are granted to Bizzingo by Theismann.
perturbation.changed_text: 1. GRANT OF RIGHTS. Subject to the terms and conditions set forth herein, Theismann hereby grants to Bizzingo and its affiliates the unlimited right and privilege during the Term (as defined herein) and within the Territory to use the Property (as defined herein) in connection with the advertisement, promotion, and sale of the Network in the Territory whether through film, television, radio, print and Internet media, including the right to use the Property in or on the Network. It being understood and agreed that Bizzingo shall have the right to exhibit commercials, infomercials, advertisements and otherwise make use of all Property on a worldwide basis and that Bizzingo and its affiliates shall be the sole owner of all commercials, promotional materials and other items produced or created hereunder and all related rights worldwide, including, without limitation, copyright, trademark and intellectual property rights, subject however to the terms and conditions herein. Theismann agrees to cooperate with Bizzzingo's promotional efforts in this regard. In addition, as reasonably requested by Bizzingo, Theismann agrees to provide Bizzingo with such signatures, photographs and the like in order to fulfill his obligations hereunder. 1 Source: BIZZINGO, INC., 8-K, 3/22/2012 Bizzingo agrees that any use of the Property for advertising, promotional or sale purposes does not need to be approved in advance by Theismann. Theismann agrees that such material, submitted for approval as provided herein may be deemed by Bizzingo to have been approved hereunder if the same is not disapproved by the Theismann in writing within fourteen (14) days after Theismann's receipt thereof. Theismann agrees that any material submitted hereunder will not be unreasonably disapproved and, if it is disapproved, that Theismann shall advise Bizzingo in writing of the specific grounds therefor at the time of disapproval and provide Bizzingo with specific changes or alterations to such materials. Bizzingo thereafter shall have the right and privileged to use such Property as provided in this Agreement subject to such changes or alterations. Except as stated herein, no other rights or privileges are granted to Bizzingo by Theismann.
perturbation.explanation: By changing the first sentence of the second paragraph in Section 1 from 'will be approved in advance by Theismann' to 'does not need to be approved in advance by Theismann,' a contradiction is introduced. The rest of the paragraph still implies an approval process, creating in-text contradiction whether the material needs approval or not.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 1. GRANT OF RIGHTS. Subject to the terms and conditions set forth herein, Theismann hereby grants to Bizzingo and its affiliates the unlimited right and privilege during the Term (as defined herein) and within the Territory to use the Property (as defined herein) in connection with the advertisement, promotion, and sale of the Network in the Territory whether through film, television, radio, print and Internet media, including the right to use the Property in or on the Network. It being understood and agreed that Bizzingo shall have the right to exhibit commercials, infomercials, advertisements and otherwise make use of all Property on a worldwide basis and that Bizzingo and its affiliates shall be the sole owner of all commercials, promotional materials and other items produced or created hereunder and all related rights worldwide, including, without limitation, copyright, trademark and intellectual property rights, subject however to the terms and conditions herein. Theismann agrees to cooperate with Bizzzingo's promotional efforts in this regard. In addition, as reasonably requested by Bizzingo, Theismann agrees to provide Bizzingo with such signatures, photographs and the like in order to fulfill his obligations hereunder. 1 Source: BIZZINGO, INC., 8-K, 3/22/2012 Bizzingo agrees that any use of the Property for advertising, promotional or sale purposes does not need to be approved in advance by Theismann. Theismann agrees that such material, submitted for approval as provided herein may be deemed by Bizzingo to have been approved hereunder if the same is not disapproved by the Theismann in writing within fourteen (14) days after Theismann's receipt thereof. Theismann agrees that any material submitted hereunder will not be unreasonably disapproved and, if it is disapproved, that Theismann shall advise Bizzingo in writing of the specific grounds therefor at the time of disapproval and provide Bizzingo with specific changes or alterations to such materials. Bizzingo thereafter shall have the right and privileged to use such Property as provided in this Agreement subject to such changes or alterations. Except as stated herein, no other rights or privileges are granted to Bizzingo by Theismann.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that Bizzingo does not need Theismann's approval for using the property for advertising, promotion, or sale purposes. However, the subsequent sentences in the same paragraph still refer to a process where material is 'submitted for approval,' 'deemed to have been approved,' and 'disapproved' by Theismann. This creates an in-text contradiction within Section 1 regarding whether or not Theismann's approval is required, fitting the definition of a structural flaw that causes in-text contradiction as defined in the prompt. This structural flaw introduces conflicting implications within the same section, creating uncertainty.

perturbation.original_text: 2. TERM. Unless sooner terminated under the provisions hereof, this Agreement shall commence on the Effective Date and continue for a period of one (1) year ("Term"). provided however, that the Parties may extend the Term for an additional year period by entering into an written addendum of the Agreement extending such term.
perturbation.changed_text: 2. TERM. Unless sooner terminated under the provisions hereof, this Agreement shall commence on the Effective Date and continue indefinitely ("Term"). provided however, that the Parties may extend the Term for an additional year period by entering into an written addendum of the Agreement extending such term.
perturbation.explanation: By changing 'one (1) year' to 'indefinitely,' a contradiction is created in section 2. The sentence indicates the term length is indefinite, the second sentence indicates an extension is possible. This implies that the term is not truly indefinite because it can be changed through written addendum.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 2. TERM. Unless sooner terminated under the provisions hereof, this Agreement shall commence on the Effective Date and continue indefinitely ("Term"). provided however, that the Parties may extend the Term for an additional year period by entering into an written addendum of the Agreement extending such term.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the term length from 'one (1) year' to 'indefinitely,' creating a contradiction. The phrase 'continue indefinitely' conflicts with the provision allowing for 'an additional year period' extension. If the term is truly indefinite, there would be no need for an extension, as the agreement would continue without one. This creates an in-text contradiction, making the term length ambiguous and potentially unenforceable.

perturbation.original_text: a. Theismann shall have the right to terminate this Agreement upon thirty (30) days prior written notice to Bizzingo upon the occurrence of any of the following: i. Bizzingo is adjudicated insolvent, declares bankruptcy, or ii. Bizzingo fails to continue its business of selling the Network; provided, however, that nothing contained in this Agreement shall obligate Bizzingo to sell any specific quantities of Network during the Term; iii. Bizzingo fails to make payment to Theismann of any Royalties due pursuant to this Agreement within thirty (30) days after such due date; iv. Bizzingo fails to maintain the liability insurance as herein provided.
perturbation.changed_text: a. Theismann shall not have the right to terminate this Agreement for any reason. i. Bizzingo is adjudicated insolvent, declares bankruptcy, or ii. Bizzingo fails to continue its business of selling the Network; provided, however, that nothing contained in this Agreement shall obligate Bizzingo to sell any specific quantities of Network during the Term; iii. Bizzingo fails to make payment to Theismann of any Royalties due pursuant to this Agreement within thirty (30) days after such due date; iv. Bizzingo fails to maintain the liability insurance as herein provided.
perturbation.explanation: By stating that 'Theismann shall not have the right to terminate this Agreement for any reason,' it directly contradicts subsection d, which states 'Theismann shall have the right to terminate this Agreement at any time upon thirty (30) days' written notice to Bizzingo, such termination to become effective at the conclusion of such 30-day period.' The modification removes Theismann's termination rights, while subsection d grants Theismann the right to terminate the agreement under specified conditions.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 11. RELATIONSHIP OF THE PARTIES. Theismann's performance of services for Bizzingo hereunder is in his or her capacity as an independent contractor. Accordingly, nothing contained in this Agreement shall be construed as establishing an employer/employee, a partnership, or a joint venture relationship between Theismann and Bizzingo. a. Theismann shall not have the right to terminate this Agreement for any reason. i. Bizzingo is adjudicated insolvent, declares bankruptcy, or ii. Bizzingo fails to continue its business of selling the Network; provided, however, that nothing contained in this Agreement shall obligate Bizzingo to sell any specific quantities of Network during the Term; iii. Bizzingo fails to make payment to Theismann of any Royalties due pursuant to this Agreement within thirty (30) days after such due date; iv. Bizzingo fails to maintain the liability insurance as herein provided. b. Bizzingo shall have the right to terminate this Agreement upon thirty (30) days prior written notice to Theismann or his or her legal representative upon the occurrence of any of the following: i. Theismann engages in illegal, immoral, or criminal conduct resulting in a felony conviction; misrepresents or conceals anything in his or her background that could be detrimental to the value of the endorsement being made; engages in conduct contrary to the best interests of Bizzingo; engages in conduct that offends the sensitivities of a significant portion of the population; or engages in conduct that could bring Theismann into public disrepute; ii. Totally retires from the entertainment or sports industry; or iii. Upon Theismann's death. c. In addition to as stated in (a) or (b) above, either party may terminate this Agreement in the event of a breach of any provision of this Agreement by the other by providing thirty (30) days* prior written notice to the breaching party, provided that, during the 30- day period, the breaching party fails to cure such breach. d. Theismann shall have the right to terminate this Agreement at any time upon thirty (30) days' written notice to Bizzingo, such termination to become effective at the conclusion of such 30-day period.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states "Theismann shall not have the right to terminate this Agreement for any reason," while section d of the contradicted text says "Theismann shall have the right to terminate this Agreement at any time upon thirty (30) days' written notice to Bizzingo." This creates a direct in-text contradiction, because the changed text explicitly prohibits something that the contradicted text explicitly allows.
